cases.name: Gate L1 check returns correct errors for missing spec.md
cases.expected: Returns { passed: false, errors: ['spec.md not found...'] }

cases.name: Gate L1 check passes when all deliverables present
steps: Create valid spec.md with YAML verdict: pass

cases.name: Loop restarts on gate FAIL and advances on PASS
steps: Set state to Phase 1 last stage (review spec)
cases.expected: Gate FAIL → loopCount incremented + back to write spec; PASS → retrospect
